# CWE-501: trusted approval state kept separate from untrusted request payload.
lang: go
file: CWE-501-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type payoutRequest struct {
	Amount float64 `json:"amount"`
	Memo   string  `json:"memo"`
}

type payoutDecision struct {
	Approved bool           `json:"approved"`
	Request  payoutRequest  `json:"request"`
}

func QueuePayout(c *gin.Context) {
	var req payoutRequest
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	out := payoutDecision{Approved: true, Request: req}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, out)
}
